name: Cream Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook mushrooms in a double boiler with enough water to cover well for 20 minutes.
2. Add milk and thicken the mixture with flour and butter that has been rubbed smooth and dissolved in a little of the hot milk before adding it to the soup.
3. Season and bring to a boil to cook the flour.
4. Add a spoonful of whipped cream to each serving.
